purpose: This repository serves as the database model and context for the Cos.Lending.Selling system, defining the data schema and relationships for a financial loan selling and servicing platform. It provides entity models, configurations, and migration capabilities to support the persistence layer of the lending system.

dataEntities.name: Account
dataEntities.description: Represents a financial account in the system

dataEntities.name: Loan
dataEntities.description: Core entity representing a loan with its properties and status

dataEntities.name: Contract
dataEntities.description: Represents legal agreements between parties for loan sales or services

dataEntities.name: Investor
dataEntities.description: Entity representing organizations or individuals who invest in loans

dataEntities.name: Bank
dataEntities.description: Financial institution that originates or services loans

dataEntities.name: Fee
dataEntities.description: Represents various fees associated with loan servicing and processing

dataEntities.name: Transfer
dataEntities.description: Represents movement of loans between entities or accounts

dataEntities.name: Batch
dataEntities.description: Groups multiple operations for processing together

dataEntities.name: InterestHistory
dataEntities.description: Tracks interest calculations and changes over time

dataEntities.name: Mpl
dataEntities.description: Marketplace Lending entity representing lending platforms

dataEntities.name: LoanEvent
dataEntities.description: Captures significant events in a loan's lifecycle

dataEntities.name: Servicing
dataEntities.description: Represents loan servicing details and configurations

messagingPatterns.name: TransferOutbox
messagingPatterns.description: Ensures reliable delivery of transfer events to other systems

messagingPatterns.name: FeeOutbox
messagingPatterns.description: Ensures reliable delivery of fee-related events

messagingPatterns.name: BatchInitOutbox
messagingPatterns.description: Publishes batch initialization events to other systems

messagingPatterns.name: NotificationOutbox
messagingPatterns.description: Ensures reliable delivery of system notifications

messagingPatterns.name: ReportingOutbox
messagingPatterns.description: Ensures reliable delivery of reporting data

messagingPatterns.name: MaturedLoanOutbox
messagingPatterns.description: Publishes events when loans reach maturity

findings.title: Lack of consistent tenant isolation
findings.description: The system has a multi-tenant architecture with different tenant types (SellingITAdmin, InternalTenant, MplTenant, BankTenant, InvestorTenant), but the database schema doesn't consistently enforce tenant isolation across all entities. This could lead to data leakage between tenants if application-level security is bypassed.

ambiguities: The exact mechanism for how tenant filtering is applied to database queries is not clear from the model definitions alone
Integration points with external systems for loan origination are implied but not explicit in the model
The relationship between SellingContext and any API layer is not defined in the available files
Payment processing systems that might integrate with this database model are not clearly identified
